# pip requirements (alternative to conda environment.yml)
# Usage: pip install -r env/requirements.txt

# ── core scientific stack ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
numpy>=2.1
scipy>=1.15
matplotlib>=3.10

# ── audio I/O ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
soundfile>=0.13      # WAV read/write
pygame>=2.6          # Phase 4 – audio playback in listening-test GUI

# ── data loading ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# (scipy.io.loadmat handles .mat files, no extra package needed)

# ── data analysis & plotting (Phase 5) ────────────────────────────────────
pandas>=2.2
seaborn>=0.13
